message:
fix(convoy): auto-close empty 0/0 convoys and require tracked issues on create

Convoys with 0 tracked issues (from the formatTrackBeadID bug) would never
close because checkAndCloseCompletedConvoys skipped them. Now treats them as
definitionally complete. Also validates gt convoy create requires at least
one tracked issue to prevent future empty convoys.

Fixes: gt-kbwjp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
